contract.rationale: FHIR AuditEvent and Provenance remain companion outputs derived from immutable internal audit joins only.

identifierPolicy.label: Audit chain hash
identifierPolicy.description: Audit companion resources derive identifiers from the immutable audit chain hash and causal join token.
identifierPolicy.versionRule: Companion audit rows are append-only; they never mutate prior logical ids in place.

cardinalityPolicy.label: Single audit companion pair
cardinalityPolicy.description: Each immutable audit join emits one AuditEvent and one Provenance row only.

redactionPolicy.label: Audit companion masked detail
redactionPolicy.description: FHIR AuditEvent and Provenance carry masked operator and actor descriptors while the immutable internal audit row stays authoritative.

companionArtifactPolicy.label: Audit hash join
companionArtifactPolicy.description: Audit companions must keep the immutable audit hash join and provenance linkage explicit.

replayPolicy.label: Append-only audit replay
replayPolicy.description: Audit companion replay may append new exports but may not silently fork prior audit companions for the same audit hash.

supersessionPolicy.label: Audit append-only companion
supersessionPolicy.description: Audit companions never rewrite the underlying audit truth; new exports append a new companion row with the same causal join.

callbackCorrelationPolicy.label: No callback correlation
callbackCorrelationPolicy.description: Clinical persistence-only contracts do not participate in partner callback correlation.

exchangeBundlePolicies.authoritativeSuccess: Export completion is authoritative only when the emitted bundle joins back to the same immutable audit hash chain.
exchangeBundlePolicies.supersessionBehavior: New exports append new bundles; they never supersede immutable prior audit truth.
exchangeBundlePolicies.invalidationBehavior: Digest drift or missing audit hash join invalidates the export bundle.
